meta.description: A personal website showcasing information about me, my portfolio, and writings from my learning journey.

greeting.title: Hello, I'm Ubay
greeting.desc: I am a Frontend Engineer competent in designing engaging and responsive user interfaces. With a mastery of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, as well as experience in frameworks such as React, Vue, and Svelte, I am committed to delivering an optimal user experience. I believe that a good interface should not only look attractive, but also provide ase and comfort for its users. Through a detailed and innovative approach, I always strive to deliver modern and high-quality web solutions.
